title: CallLint Trust Event
description: A first-party, privacy-preserving web-funnel event (calllint.trust-event.v1) that counts Trust-page → install-intent conversion with NO third-party vendor and NO LLM (new13 Phase 2.5-B; ADR 0055 §2/§5). This is the CLOSED, storable shape emitted by sanitizeTrustEvent (@calllint/trust-event-contract) — PII-free and cookie-free by construction: there is no free-text field that could carry a URL, prompt, or secret, and the only coarse dimension (pageBucket) is a server-side sha256 hash, never a raw path. The wire identity is the `schema` const tag, not the filename or $id (ADR 0043/0055 §5). It introduces no new score, verdict, or authority model and can never move a verdict or a page digest (ADR 0053 §3).

schema.description: Wire identity. Distinct from calllint.telemetry-event / calllint.trust-lookup-index.v1.

event.description: The closed funnel-event vocabulary. trust_page_viewed / trust_page_to_install are reused verbatim from the CLI telemetry vocabulary so the two never diverge; app_created_viewed / claim_cta_clicked are web-surface-specific.

ts.description: ISO-8601 UTC observation instant, stamped server-side by the emitter (never client-set).

pageBucket.description: The one permitted coarse dimension, hashed SERVER-SIDE (ADR 0055 §2). A sha256 over a coarse page identifier — never a raw path, query, or referrer. Optional: absent when the emitter carried no dimension.
